summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Next.js DynoPay application setup and configuration. All required environment variables verified, frontend service running successfully, homepage loads correctly with proper DynoPay crypto payment gateway content.
passed_tests: .env file exists with all 8 required environment variables
NEXTAUTH_URL correctly uses pod preview URL (b03ec8f1-84a9-44f5-a10f-734a0373618e.preview.emergentagent.com)
NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL correctly uses pod preview URL
Homepage loads successfully with HTTP 200 status
Homepage renders proper DynoPay crypto payment gateway content
All navigation elements present and functional (How It Works, Features, Use Cases, Documentation)
CTA buttons working (Get Started, Start Accepting Crypto, Learn More)
Sign In button redirects properly to /auth/login
Authentication page loads with proper login form
NextAuth Google OAuth provider configured correctly
README.md exists with comprehensive setup documentation
All backend API endpoints returning 200 status
Environment variables loaded correctly in application
